# TrafficCone

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TrafficCone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TrafficCone { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
roadworks, tarmac, safety, block

## Categories
transportation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/traffic-cone)
